data.narrative:
OVERALL
Attribution quality is below threshold at 42.4%, so blended estimates are the operative figures. 66 estimated ICPs at $160.45 CPICP across $10,589 spend — acceptable overall but two segments are actively dragging efficiency.

SEGMENTS
- for ag: $121.64 CPICP, 3.5 ICPs
- for wellness: $130.51 CPICP, 9.5 ICPs
- for sustainable: $136.51 CPICP, 4.2 ICPs
- for delis: $141.73 CPICP, 11.4 ICPs
- for creameries: $146.47 CPICP, 5.9 ICPs
- for BBQ: $151.75 CPICP, 6.5 ICPs
- for breweries: $155.56 CPICP, 2.4 ICPs
- for distillers: $168.48 CPICP, 3.4 ICPs
- for bakeries: $175.31 CPICP, 10.3 ICPs
- for juice: $185.31 CPICP, 6.1 ICPs
- for pizzerias: $331.67 CPICP, 1.8 ICPs
- for vineyards: $404.93 CPICP, 1.0 ICPs
- Zero ICPs: none

WATCH
- for pizzerias: CPICP +97% vs 4-week avg, $597 spent for 1.8 ICPs
- for vineyards: CPICP +54.2% vs 4-week avg, $405 spent for 1.0 ICPs
- for BBQ and for bakeries: 0% UTM capture rate, blended estimates unverifiable

ACTION
- Pause or cut budget on for pizzerias and for vineyards immediately pending creative or audience refresh
- Investigate UTM tracking failure on for BBQ and for bakeries before next spend cycle
- Reallocate recovered budget toward for wellness and for delis, both high-volume and near or below average CPICP

data.narrative:
OVERALL
Strong week overall with 78 estimated ICPs at $146.06 CPICP. Attribution quality is 84.6%, above the 50% threshold. All active campaigns produced at least some ICPs.

SEGMENTS
- for breweries: $60.61 CPICP, 6.4 ICPs

- for juice: $132.77 CPICP, 8.7 ICPs
- for wellness: $214.23 CPICP, 6.4 ICPs
- for pizzerias: $251.02 CPICP, 2.3 ICPs
- for distillers: $325.73 CPICP, 1.6 ICPs
- for delis: $356.33 CPICP, 4.6 ICPs
- for rev.2Health, Fitness & Personal Care: $507.29 CPICP, 1 ICP
- for vineyards: $1159.95 CPICP, 0.2 ICPs
- Zero ICPs: None

WATCH
- for delis: $1639 spent, CPICP up 122.1% vs 4wk avg, 3 IC conversions
- for vineyards: $232 spent, CPICP up 136.3% vs 4wk avg, effectively zero ICPs
- for wellness: CPICP up 38.7% vs 4wk avg on $1371 spend

ACTION
- Pause vineyards immediately; $232 producing 0.2 ICPs at $1159.95 is unrecoverable this week
- Cut delis budget by at least 50% until CPICP returns near 4wk prior baseline
- Reallocate delis and vineyards budget to breweries and ag, the two lowest-CPICP campaigns this week
- Monitor rev.2Health, Fitness & Personal Care next week before scaling; one IC conversion is insufficient signal

data.narrative:
OVERALL
Week of Mar 9: 52 estimated ICPs at $171.98 CPICP across $8,943 spend. Attribution quality is at the 50% floor — interpret hybrid estimates with caution this week.

SEGMENTS
- for bakeries: $82.34 CPICP, 5.7 ICPs
- for delis: $114.18 CPICP, 12.7 ICPs
- for sustainable: $118.91 CPICP, 4.2 ICPs
- for wellness: $120.61 CPICP, 5.6 ICPs
- for distillers: $125.72 CPICP, 4.1 ICPs
- for creameries: $152.10 CPICP, 5.0 ICPs
- for BBQ: $156.23 CPICP, 5.6 ICPs
- for breweries: $189.41 CPICP, 1.8 ICPs
- for ag: $266.57 CPICP, 1.4 ICPs
- for juice: $279.73 CPICP, 2.3 ICPs
- for pizzerias: $355.85 CPICP, 1.5 ICPs
- for ICrev2test: $796.22 CPICP, 1.8 ICPs
- for vineyards: $1,245.10 CPICP, 0.3 ICPs
- Zero ICPs: none

WATCH
- for vineyards: $374 spent, 0.3 ICPs, CPICP up 796% vs 4wk avg — effectively dead spend
- for ICrev2test: $1,433 spent, $796 CPICP, up 212% vs 4wk avg — test is failing at scale
- for pizzerias: CPICP up 124% vs 4wk avg with minimal volume

ACTION
- Pause vineyards immediately; reallocate $374 to bakeries or delis
- Pause or hard-cap ICrev2test this week; do not let $1,433 repeat without a creative change
- Cut pizzerias budget by 50% pending two-week recovery window
- Protect bakeries and delis budgets — both are top volume and below $115 CPICP

data.narrative:
OVERALL
Strong week overall: 70 estimated ICPs at $146.54 CPICP across $10,257 spend. Attribution quality is 64.3%, acceptable but watch creameries at 35.7%.

SEGMENTS
- for wellness: $67.48 CPICP, 16.6 ICPs
- for breweries: $68.63 CPICP, 5.2 ICPs
- for vineyards: $101.17 CPICP, 4.1 ICPs
- for juice: $121.05 CPICP, 8.7 ICPs
- for sustainable: $122.56 CPICP, 4.4 ICPs
- for delis: $140.05 CPICP, 10.8 ICPs
- for ICrev2test: $191.19 CPICP, 2.8 ICPs
- for BBQ: $193.13 CPICP, 4.7 ICPs
- for ag: $211.38 CPICP, 1.9 ICPs
- for bakeries: $243.30 CPICP, 6.2 ICPs
- for creameries: $289.72 CPICP, 2.8 ICPs
- for pizzerias: $505.38 CPICP, 1.1 ICPs
- for distillers: $772.31 CPICP, 0.7 ICPs
- Zero ICPs: none

WATCH
- distillers: $772 CPICP, +401% vs 4-week avg, only 0.7 ICPs on $541 spend
- pizzerias: $505 CPICP, +152% vs 4-week avg, nearly zero ICP volume
- bakeries: $243 CPICP, +111% vs 4-week avg, $1,508 spend — largest dollar waste among spiking segments
- creameries: 35.7% attribution quality, weakest confidence in the portfolio
- delis: +61.5% above 4-week avg at $140 CPICP on $1,513 spend — high volume but degrading efficiency

ACTION
- Pause or cut distillers budget immediately; performance is not recoverable at current trajectory
- Cut pizzerias budget by at least 50% pending one additional week of data
- Reduce bakeries daily budget until CPICP returns within 20% of 4-week average
- Reallocate savings to wellness and breweries, both under $70 CPICP with positive WoW trends
- Investigate creameries attribution setup; 35.7% quality suggests tracking or UTM issues
- Flag delis for close watch next week before any further budget increases

data.narrative:
OVERALL
Mixed week with bright spots dragging up a costly average. Hybrid CPICP is $157.49 across 66 estimated ICPs and $10,394 spend. Attribution quality is 65.2%, acceptable but worth monitoring as creameries, delis, distillers, and wellness all fall below 50% IC attribution individually.

SEGMENTS
- for pizzerias: $84.92 CPICP, 6.8 ICPs
- for breweries: $90.16 CPICP, 4 ICPs
- for juice: $98.90 CPICP, 11.1 ICPs
- for bakeries: $133.96 CPICP, 13.6 ICPs
- for ag: $147.60 CPICP, 2.7 ICPs
- for BBQ: $176.11 CPICP, 5.4 ICPs
- for sustainable: $197.33 CPICP, 2.8 ICPs
- for creameries: $199.67 CPICP, 4.1 ICPs
- for delis: $200.72 CPICP, 7.9 ICPs
- for distillers: $265.10 CPICP, 2.1 ICPs
- for wellness: $304.20 CPICP, 4.1 ICPs
- for vineyards: $304.52 CPICP, 1.4 ICPs
- Zero ICPs: none

WATCH
- for wellness: CPICP up 223.5% vs 4-week average on $1,247 spend, only 2 IC conversions
- for delis: CPICP up 92.3% vs 4-week average, steepest absolute dollar deterioration this week

ACTION
- Cut wellness budget immediately pending creative or audience review; $304 CPICP is unsustainable
- Review delis audience and creative this week before next budget cycle; spike is accelerating
- Reallocate freed budget toward juice and pizzerias, both outperforming 4-week averages significantly
